title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
